title: Item Router
description: Small Quality Of Life mod adding the item router, sorting players' items in nearby containers when interacted with
body:
Feel free to use this mod in your modpack!

## Description

Provides an interactable block auto-depositing and sorting your inventory into nearby containers when interacted with.

Not only chests but also furnaces and anything with an inventory.
No UI interaction, everything is done and happens in the world.
Right-click the block to sort your inventory into nearby containers.

The Item Router comes empty when placed.
Socket pearls into its faces to unlock its vision in that direction.
Pearls come in 3 variants, each providing a different range.
The pearls are:
- Obsidian Pearl, 4 blocks range
- Ender Pearl, 8 blocks range
- Amethyst Pearl, 16 blocks range

Right-click with a pearl onto a face to socket it, or swap already placed pearls.
Shift right-click to remove a pearl from a socket.

## Upcoming

I plan to bring this mod to newer versions when I have the time to.

## Thank you

I make mods as a hobby, and I'm excited to polish and expand on them. Stay tuned as I have many mods planned, each better than the last!

Thank you for viewing my mods <3
